11. ~conductor(beethoven) [negated conjecture 10]
12. ~conductor(beethoven) [flattening 11]
16. ! [X0,X1] : (conductor(X0) | (~orchestra(X1) | ~leads(X0,X1))) [ennf transformation 9]
17. ! [X0,X1] : (conductor(X0) | ~orchestra(X1) | ~leads(X0,X1)) [flattening 16]
21. orchestra(vienna_music_society) [cnf transformation 7]

23. ~leads(X0,X1) | ~orchestra(X1) | conductor(X0) [cnf transformation 17]
